note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

a_motion_to_exceed_the_maximum_allowed_h.guidance: A dollar amount as digits (e.g. 1,250.00). Many forms pre-print '$' next to the blank; if so, do NOT type a second '$' (the engine strips a leading '$'). Verify against the form.

attached_is_a_copy_of_the_court_orders_p.guidance: A wall-clock time (e.g. 10:00). If the form pre-prints AM/PM, circle/strike the correct one by hand — the engine does not.
